stimulus: sai neg ha du chet tak-sha ras kei ren faz
A warm, easing feeling in the abdomen that seems reactive and settles toward rest.
sai neu lo du heda grav-pres stan meda unu res
sai pos ma un holo cal stan kei sel res
sai neg ha tri abdo tak-pres pul meda mem dis
sai mix ha du difa hol-rawa osc meda unu faz
A sharp, rising negative feeling in the chest that seems reactive and pushes toward freezing.
A low, steady calm through the whole body that feels self-generated and settles toward rest.
A pulsing tight-pressure feeling in the abdomen, strong and negative, tied to memory and pushing toward release.
A mostly neutral heavy pressure behind the eyes that just sits there, with no clear source and a tendency to settle.
